data.content: I ( X ; Y ) = H ( X ) - H ( X | Y ) = H ( Y ) - H ( Y | X )
data.latex: I ( X ; Y ) = H ( X ) - H ( X | Y ) = H ( Y ) - H ( Y | X )

data.content:
```latex
\min_{G} \max_{D} V_I(D, G) = V(D, G) - \lambda I(c; G(z, c))
```
data.latex:
```latex
\min_{G} \max_{D} V_I(D, G) = V(D, G) - \lambda I(c; G(z, c))
```

data.content:
```latex
L_I(G, Q) = E_{c \sim P(c), x \sim G(z, c)}[\log Q(c | x)] + H(c)
= E_{x \sim G(z, c)}[\mathbb{E}_{c' \sim P(c|x)}[\log Q(c' | x)]] + H(c)
\leq I(c; G(z, c))
```
data.latex:
```latex
L_I(G, Q) = E_{c \sim P(c), x \sim G(z, c)}[\log Q(c | x)] + H(c)
= E_{x \sim G(z, c)}[\mathbb{E}_{c' \sim P(c|x)}[\log Q(c' | x)]] + H(c)
\leq I(c; G(z, c))
```

data.content:
```latex
I(c; G(z, c)) = H(c) - H(c | G(z, c))

= \mathbb{E}_{x \sim G(z, c)}[\mathbb{E}_{c' \sim P(c|x)}[\log P(c'|x)]] + H(c)

= \mathbb{E}_{x \sim G(z, c)}[D_{\text{KL}}(P(\cdot|x) \parallel Q(\cdot|x))] + \mathbb{E}_{c' \sim P(c|x)}[\log Q(c'|x)] + H(c)

\geq \mathbb{E}_{x \sim G(z, c)}[\mathbb{E}_{c' \sim P(c|x)}[\log Q(c'|x)]] + H(c)
```
data.latex:
```latex
I(c; G(z, c)) = H(c) - H(c | G(z, c))

= \mathbb{E}_{x \sim G(z, c)}[\mathbb{E}_{c' \sim P(c|x)}[\log P(c'|x)]] + H(c)

= \mathbb{E}_{x \sim G(z, c)}[D_{\text{KL}}(P(\cdot|x) \parallel Q(\cdot|x))] + \mathbb{E}_{c' \sim P(c|x)}[\log Q(c'|x)] + H(c)

\geq \mathbb{E}_{x \sim G(z, c)}[\mathbb{E}_{c' \sim P(c|x)}[\log Q(c'|x)]] + H(c)
```

data.content:
The formula in the image can be written in LaTeX as follows:

```latex
\min_{G, Q} \max_D V_{\text{InfoGAN}}(D, G, Q) = V(D, G) - \lambda L_I(G, Q)
```

This will produce the same mathematical expression shown in the image.

data.content:
```latex
\begin{align*}
\mathbb{E}_{x \sim X, y \sim Y | x}[f(x,y)] &= \int_x P(x) \int_y P(y|x)f(x,y)dydx \\
&= \int_x \int_y P(x,y)f(x,y)dydx \\
&= \int_x \int_y P(x,y)f(x,y)\int_{x'}P(x'|y)dx'dydx \\
&= \int_x P(x) \int_y P(y|x)\int_{x'}P(x'|y)f(x',y)dx'dydx \\
&= \mathbb{E}_{x \sim X, y \sim Y | x, x' \sim X | y}[f(x',y)]
\end{align*}
```
data.latex:
```latex
\begin{align*}
\mathbb{E}_{x \sim X, y \sim Y | x}[f(x,y)] &= \int_x P(x) \int_y P(y|x)f(x,y)dydx \\
&= \int_x \int_y P(x,y)f(x,y)dydx \\
&= \int_x \int_y P(x,y)f(x,y)\int_{x'}P(x'|y)dx'dydx \\
&= \int_x P(x) \int_y P(y|x)\int_{x'}P(x'|y)f(x',y)dx'dydx \\
&= \mathbb{E}_{x \sim X, y \sim Y | x, x' \sim X | y}[f(x',y)]
\end{align*}
```
